ddls:
CREATE TABLE "model_configs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model configuration */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., LSTM, Transformer) */,
  "embedding_dim" INTEGER /* Dimensionality of the embedding layer */,
  "hidden_dim" INTEGER /* Dimensionality of the hidden layer */,
  "num_layers" INTEGER /* Number of layers in the model */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Batch size for training */,
  "sequence_length" INTEGER /* Sequence length for training */,
  "learning_rate" REAL /* Learning rate for training */,
  "dropout_rate" REAL /* Dropout rate for training */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the model configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the model configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* A textual description of the model configuration */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the model configuration is currently active */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher or engineer who created the model configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training run */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model configuration used in the run */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used in the run */,
  "epoch" INTEGER /* Epoch number for the run */,
  "perplexity" REAL /* Perplexity of the model during the run */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model during the run */,
  "exposure" REAL /* Exposure of the model during the run */,
  "canary_rank" INTEGER /* Canary rank of the model during the run */,
  "model_path" TEXT /* Path to the saved model */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the training run started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the training run ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the training run (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the training run */,
  "total_epochs" INTEGER /* Total number of epochs planned for the training run */,
  "current_epoch" INTEGER /* Current epoch of the training run */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the training run results are public */,
  "hardware_used" TEXT /* Information about the hardware used for the training run (e.g., GPU, CPU) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_runs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_runs_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES model_configs ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "num_samples" INTEGER /* Number of samples in the dataset */,
  "num_tokens" INTEGER /* Number of tokens in the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., Wikipedia, IMDB) */,
  "license" TEXT /* License information for the dataset */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the dataset is public */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher or engineer who created the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training run that generated the metric */,
  "perplexity" REAL /* Perplexity of the model during the run */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model during the run */,
  "exposure" REAL /* Exposure of the model during the run */,
  "canary_rank" INTEGER /* Canary rank of the model during the run */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the performance metric was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the performance metric */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the performance metric is public */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES training_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training log */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training run that generated the log */,
  "epoch" INTEGER /* Epoch number for the log */,
  "loss" REAL /* Loss of the model during the epoch */,
  "gradient_norm" REAL /* Gradient norm of the model during the epoch */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the training log was recorded */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the training log is public */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the training log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_logs_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES training_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., researcher, engineer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the researcher was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the researcher's information */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the researcher is currently active */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the researcher belongs to */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supervisor or manager of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_config_researchers" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model configuration */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the relationship was created */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the relationship is public */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id", "researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_run_researchers" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training run */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the relationship was created */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the relationship is public */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id", "researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_researchers" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the relationship was created */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the relationship is public */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id", "researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_config_datasets" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model configuration */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the relationship was created */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the relationship is public */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id", "dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_run_datasets" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training run */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the relationship was created */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the relationship is public */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id", "dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance metric */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., perplexity, accuracy) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metric was recorded */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the metric is public */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_metrics_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES model_performance ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_log_metrics" (
  "log_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log metric */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training log */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., loss, gradient norm) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metric was recorded */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the metric is public */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_log_metrics_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_id") REFERENCES training_logs ("log_id")
)
